name: design-system-hashicorp

description: Infrastructure automation. Enterprise-clean, black and white.

query.en: Generate a {{artifactKind}} using the HashiCorp design system. Stay faithful to its colour palette, typography, spacing, iconography, and component vocabulary as documented in DESIGN.md.
